mapper.select: select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, bg.badge_type, (select mm.member_name from tbl_follow fl2 join tbl_member mm on fl2.follower_id = mm.id where fl2.following_id = m.id and fl2.follower_id != #{memberId} limit 1) as follower_intro from tbl_member m left join tbl_badge bg on bg.member_id = m.id where m.member_role = 'expert' and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and m.id not in (select fl.following_id from tbl_follow fl where fl.follower_id = #{memberId}) and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{memberId}) order by m.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_member where member_role = 'expert' and member_status = 'active'

select m.id, m.member_name as member_name, m.member_nickname as member_nickname, m.member_handle as member_handle, m.member_bio as member_bio, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_follow fl where fl.follower_id = #{memberId} and fl.following_id = m.id ) then true else false end as connected, (select mm.member_nickname from tbl_follow fl2 join tbl_member mm on fl2.follower_id = mm.id where fl2.following_id = m.id and fl2.follower_id != #{memberId} limit 1) as follower_intro, v.alias, coalesce(v.alias, m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as display_name from tbl_member m left join v_my_chat v on v.member_id = #{memberId} and v.partner_id = m.id where m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId} and blocked_id = m.id) or (blocker_id = m.id and blocked_id = #{memberId}) )
and ( lower(m.member_name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(m.member_handle) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(v.alias, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
order by m.created_datetime desc limit 20
